name: Pork Chops a La Jenni Fdgn81a
recipeInstructions:
1. Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
2. Dip chops into flour and shake off excess.
3. Brown chops on both sides in butter in a large skillet.
4. Place chops in overlapping rows in a shallow casserole.
5. Spoon pan drippings over chops.
6. Spread mushroom soup over chops.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and paprika.
8. Bake covered in a preheated 350°F oven for 15 to 20 minutes.
